Utility class for constructing tabular data used by PageViewerPanel.

parseCurrency(String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.util.FormatUtils
Parses the provided text using the active currency pattern, falling back to a locale-aware sanitisation when the exact pattern cannot be matched.
parseOfx(InputStream) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FileImportService
Parses an OFX (Open Financial Exchange) file from an input stream and converts its transactions into a list of ImportedTransaction objects.
parseQif(InputStream, String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FileImportService
Parses a QIF (Quicken Interchange Format) file from an input stream.
